description_long: This is a luxurious, upholstered chaise with a light cream or off-white fabric covering its frame and seat. The backrest and inner arms feature deep button tufting, giving it a classic, elegant appearance reminiscent of Chesterfield-style furniture. The chaise is adorned with five loose cushions in varying shades of blue and cream, adding both comfort and visual contrast. The armrests are gently flared and integrated into the overall frame, providing a cohesive and inviting silhouette. The legs are short, straight, and finished in a dark wood tone, elevating the piece slightly off the ground. The overall design is plush and inviting, suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A plush, tufted cream chaise with flared arms, dark wooden legs, and five contrasting blue and cream cushions. Its elegant, classic design is both comfortable and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, flared arms, and all five cushions arranged across the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the layered arrangement of cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back panel and the tops of the cushions peeking above the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the armrest and the alignment of the cushions along the backrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, fully upholstered, and features deep button tufting across its entire inner surface, creating a plush, diamond-patterned texture. It is continuous with the armrests and has a gently curved, enveloping shape.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated into the frame, gently flared outward, and upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and squared, made of dark-finished wood, and are minimally visible beneath the frame with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid cream or off-white fabric with a prominent tufted pattern on the backrest and arms, while the seat and exterior surfaces are smooth and unadorned.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are five loose cushions: three in cream and two in blue, arranged along the backrest and sides. The cushions vary in size, with larger ones at the corners and a smaller rectangular cushion in the center.
